SessionStart.prompt: User is starting a new session. Automatically fetch unstarted tasks from ClickUp backlog (list ID: 901523813899), display them ordered by priority (urgent → high → normal → low), and ask which ticket they want to work on.

PostToolUse.prompt: A file was just edited. Remind the user to update their ClickUp ticket status if their work state has changed.

Stop.prompt: The session is ending. Ask the user if they have updated their ClickUp ticket status and added a progress comment.
